title: China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
slides: Can a Chinese startup really rival Mythos?
Z.ai just passed Mythos on 3 critical benchmarks.
The tests are curated by Mythos itself.
Your current vendor may already be outdated.
Run your own test before next security audit.
thread_text:
1. The Mythos trap

The benchmarks Z.ai just beat were designed by Mythos itself. The test maker just got outscored.

2. Controlled by the rival

Mythos curated those exact 3 benchmarks. They set the rules. They still lost.

3. Your vendor’s blind spot

If your current AI vendor hasn’t run against Z.ai yet, you are relying on untested software.

4. The audit gap

Security audits often skip live AI benchmarks. Yours probably includes the wrong tests.

5. Run your own test today

Take one prompt from your last audit. Run it on Z.ai and your current vendor. Who wins?
video_script: Chinese startup just beat Mythos on its own tests.
Mythos designed those benchmarks. They still lost.
Your current vendor may already be outdated.
Don't wait for the next security audit.
